name: About Town Limousine
recent_news: No notable news found; no web presence under this name. Listed phone (310) 454-3228 appears associated with 'Esprit Limousine Service' in Pacific Palisades per Yelp, suggesting the entity may be inactive or have been absorbed/renamed.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Single-vehicle Pacific Palisades limo/livery operation with 3 employees and ~$220K revenue; no evidence of school-bus, SPED, or student transportation contracting. Inclusion in the source list appears to be a misclassification of the special-needs flag.

name: Ace Executive Limousine Svc
recent_news: No M&A or operating news located. A separately named 'Ace Limousine' at 4010 Santa Monica Blvd in Los Angeles is marked CLOSED on Yelp; unclear if related. Distinct from 'Ace Limousine & Airport Service' (PA-based, 610 area code).
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Three-employee LA executive-car/limo service with no evidence of yellow-bus, SPED, or contracted student transportation operations; revenue (~$220K) is far below any tuck-in threshold.

name: All Pro Transportation Svc
recent_news: No news located for the Inglewood CA entity. Search results surface unrelated 'All-Pro Transportation' freight brokerages in IL and OH, not the CA livery operator at this PO Box.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Three-employee PO-Box-registered Inglewood operator with no website, no district contracts identified, and no evidence of school-bus or special-needs student transportation. Likely a sole-proprietor sedan/limo service.

name: Any Limo Svc

fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Tiny Koreatown LA limo service at a multi-tenant office address (550 S Gramercy Pl, Suite 401); 3 employees, ~$220K revenue; no school-bus or SPED operations identified.

name: Carey Limo Weislaw Machal
recent_news: Listing appears to be a Carey Limousine affiliate/franchisee operator. Carey International is a global chauffeured-transport network with LA subsidiary offices in Culver City (5730 Uplander Way and 6023 Bristol Pkwy); this Malcolm Ave entry is consistent with an individual affiliate driver/agent rather than an independent operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Affiliate of Carey International (strategic chauffeured-transport platform), not an independent operator. Pure executive-car/limo service with no school-bus, SPED, or contracted student transportation operations.
